items.name: BALESCO-Starwave Girls Couple
items.description:
Sweater dengan sentuhan neon–galaxy yang memancarkan energi playful & stylish! Desain graffiti warna pink–ungu yang eye-catching bikin avatar kamu tampil lebih bold dan unik. Cocok dipakai barengan pasangan, sahabat, atau sebagai outfit streetwear yang standout di Roblox.

Grafis halus, warna cerah, dan vibe modern—siap nemenin kamu ke setiap game dengan gaya yang lebih bersinar!

items.name: Evil Camo V.S. Magma
items.description:
Magma: Why? Why are you just gonna betray us like this!?
Camo: I have seen it.. What I must do... It was ment to be this way!!!
Magma: To betray your friends? You're Joining forces with him!? Just walk away with Demon Camo!?!?
Camo: I AM A STREET RAT!!! I TURNED EVIL 9 YEARS OLD!!!! IT WAS MENT TO BE THIS WAY!!! MY DESTINY...
Magma: What about Blaze!? Naz? Zero!? Darkness!? ME!!!!
Camo: I DON't EVEN REMEMBER HER!!!! I COULD CARE LESS WHAT HAPPENS TO HER!!!!
Magma: I'LL BREAK YOUR ARMS AND LEGS IF THATS WHAT IT TAKES TO BRING YOU BACK!!!!
Camo: SHUT THAT RED FURED MOUTH!!!! I'M GONNA  SHUT YOU UP!!!!!!
*WAP*
Magma: ...Hufff.... Huh....
Camo: *Gets away with Demon camo and Blistering Blaze*
